_comment: Each entry below is a SEPARATE example response body for a different error condition. Pick the one that matches your case.

error.message: Uploaded file is not a valid PDF (got Content-Type: image/png).
Document detected as MTO Roadside Inspection Report (Form SR-LV-067), not the CVOR Carrier Safety Profile (SR-LV-029A).
OCR confidence below threshold (0.42). Image resolution: 32 dpi. Re-scan at ≥150 dpi or supply the original PDF download from MTO.
Could not locate Performance Summary table on page 2. Required field is unrecoverable.
100 requests / minute quota exceeded for this API key.
Job 'job_xxx' does not exist or has expired (jobs are retained for 24 h after completion).
Internal server error. Please retry with exponential backoff. Reference traceId in support tickets.
